title: calamagrostis minima
intro: Calamagrostis minima, also known as small fescue, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. The herbal preparations of Calamagrostis minima typically involve infusions or decoctions of the plant, which can be consumed as teas or used topically in the form of poultices or ointments.
